## Type of Change

Please check the relevant option(s):

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 UI/UX improvement
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🧪 Test coverage improvement
- [ ] 🔧 Configuration change
- [ ] 🏗️ Infrastructure/build change

## Testing

**How has this been tested?**
Please describe the tests you ran to verify your changes.

- [ ] Manual testing on macOS 14+ (Sonoma)
- [ ] Tested on Apple Silicon (M1/M2/M3)
- [ ] Tested on Intel Mac
- [ ] Frontend build passes (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Backend build passes (`swift build`)
- [ ] No ESLint errors (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] No Swift compiler warnings
- [ ] Tested with Docker containers
- [ ] Tested with virtual machines
- [ ] Tested automation features
- [ ] Tested on different browsers (Safari, Chrome, Firefox)

**Test Configuration:**
- macOS Version: [e.g., macOS 14.2]
- Mac Model: [e.g., Mac mini M2]
- Docker Engine: [e.g., OrbStack 1.0]

## Checklist

**Code Quality:**
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines (see AGENTS.md)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have removed all debug statements (console.log, print)
- [ ] I have not used `any` types in TypeScript (use `unknown` instead)
- [ ] I have not used force unwraps (`!`) or force casts (`as!`) in Swift
- [ ] I have not suppressed type errors (`@ts-ignore`, `@ts-expect-error`)

**Documentation:**
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] I have updated CHANGELOG.md with my changes
- [ ] I have added/updated code comments where necessary
- [ ] I have updated README.md if needed

**Testing:**
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have tested on both Apple Silicon and Intel (if applicable)

**Apple HIG Compliance (for UI changes):**
- [ ] UI follows Apple Human Interface Guidelines
- [ ] Uses glassmorphism design (backdrop-blur-xl)
- [ ] Rounded corners (rounded-xl or rounded-2xl)
- [ ] Proper hover/active states
- [ ] Dark mode optimized
- [ ] Responsive design (works on mobile)

**Git:**
- [ ] My commits follow Conventional Commits format
- [ ] I have rebased my branch on the latest master
- [ ] I have resolved all merge conflicts
- [ ] My commit messages are clear and descriptive
